```{r}
    yearly_summaries[[ paste0( drug_code, "_", yr ) ]] <- sample_atc
    }
  }

# convert to long format
summary_long_co <- bind_rows( yearly_summaries, .id = "cohort" ) %>%
  select( - age_2005 )
summary( summary_long_co )

N06A_co <- summary_long_co %>%
  filter( grepl( "^N06A", cohort ) ) %>%
  mutate( cohort_year = as.numeric( str_extract( cohort, "\\d{4}$" ) ) ) %>%
  select( -1 ) %>%
  rename(
    prescription_use_N06A = prescription_use,
    prescription_count_N06A = prescription_count
  )

N05B_co <- summary_long_co %>%
  filter( grepl( "^N05B", cohort ) ) %>%
  mutate( cohort_year = as.numeric( str_extract( cohort, "\\d{4}$" ) ) ) %>%
  select( -1 ) %>%
  rename(
    prescription_use_N05B = prescription_use,
    prescription_count_N05B = prescription_count
  )

pooled_data_co <- left_join(
  N06A_co, N05B_co,
  by = c( "cohort_year", "year", "lopnr", "sexual_identity_2010", "sexual_identity_2014", "sexual_identity_2021", "birth_year", "sex", "country_of_birth", "survey_year", "sexual_identity_baseline", "generation", "age", "age_group" ) ) %>%
  mutate( age_sex = interaction( age_group, sex ) ) %>%
  select( cohort_year, lopnr, year, age, age_group, sex, age_sex, birth_year, generation, country_of_birth, sexual_identity_baseline, sexual_identity_2010, sexual_identity_2014, sexual_identity_2021, survey_year, everything() ) %>%
  filter( age >= 16, age <= 59 )

summary( pooled_data_co )

# random check incomplete variables
miss_var_summary( pooled_data_co %>% filter( cohort_year == 2006 ) ) %>% filter( n_miss > 0 ) %>% print( n = Inf )
miss_var_summary( pooled_data_co %>% filter( cohort_year == 2010 ) ) %>% filter( n_miss > 0 ) %>% print( n = Inf )
miss_var_summary( pooled_data_co %>% filter( cohort_year == 2014 ) ) %>% filter( n_miss > 0 ) %>% print( n = Inf )
miss_var_summary( pooled_data_co %>% filter( cohort_year == 2021 ) ) %>% filter( n_miss > 0 ) %>% print( n = Inf )

sample_summary_co <- pooled_data_co %>%
  distinct( cohort_year, lopnr, sexual_identity_baseline ) %>%
  group_by( cohort_year, sexual_identity_baseline ) %>%
  summarise( n = n(), .groups = "drop" ) %>%
  mutate( sexual_identity_baseline = fct_na_value_to_level( sexual_identity_baseline, level = "Missing" ),
          identity_group = case_when( sexual_identity_baseline %in% c( "Heterosexual", "Missing" ) ~ "Heterosexual or Missing",
                                      sexual_identity_baseline %in% c( "Homosexual", "Bisexual", "Other" ) ~ "Sexual Minority" ) ) %>%
  arrange( cohort_year, sexual_identity_baseline )

p_sample_co <- ggplot(
  sample_summary_co,
  aes( x = cohort_year,
       y = n,
       color = sexual_identity_baseline,
       group = sexual_identity_baseline ) ) +
  
  geom_line( linewidth = 0.8 ) +
  geom_point( size = 1.2 ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c( 2006, 2021 ),
    breaks = seq( 2006, 2021, 3 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.05 ) ) ) +
  
  scale_color_manual( values = c(
    "Heterosexual" = "#F8766D",
    "Homosexual"   = "#00BFC4",
    "Bisexual"     = "#C77CFF",
    "Other"        = "#7CAE00",
    "Missing"      = "#7f7f7f" ) ) +
  
  labs( x =  "Year of Cohort Sample",
        y = "Number of Participants",
        color = NULL ) +
  
  facet_wrap( ~ identity_group, scales = "free_y" ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing = unit( 1.5, "lines" ),
    axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ),
    legend.position = "bottom" ) +
  
  ggh4x::facetted_pos_scales( y = list(
    identity_group == "Heterosexual or Missing" ~ scale_y_continuous( limits = c( 9000, 70000 ), breaks = c( seq( 10000, 70000, 10000 ) ), labels = scales::label_comma(), expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0 ) ) ),
    identity_group == "Sexual Minority" ~ scale_y_continuous( limits = c( 900, 2000 ), breaks = c( seq( 1000, 2000, 500 ) ), labels = scales::label_comma(), expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0 ) ) ) ) ) +
  
  coord_capped_cart( bottom = 'right', gap = 0 )

p_sample_co
ggsave( "results_output/plots_general/p_sample_co.svg", plot = p_sample_co, width = 11, height = 6 )
```

##### 3.3.2. Check overlapping participants
```{r}
# among all participants
lopnr_years_all <- pooled_data_co %>%
  select( cohort_year, lopnr ) %>%
  distinct( cohort_year, lopnr, .keep_all = TRUE ) %>%
  mutate( value = 1 ) %>%
  pivot_wider( names_from = cohort_year, 
               values_from = value, 
               values_fill = 0 ) %>%
  as.data.frame()

pdf( "results_output/plots_general/p_overlap_co_upset_all.pdf", width = 11, height = 9, onefile = FALSE )
upset(
  data = lopnr_years_all,
  nsets = length( colnames( lopnr_years_all )[-1] ),
  sets = colnames( lopnr_years_all )[-1],
  keep.order = TRUE,
  order.by = "freq",
  mainbar.y.label = "Intersection Size",
  sets.x.label = "Sample Size",
  sets.bar.color = "#A32214",
  point.size = 2.5,
  line.size = 1,
  text.scale = c( 1.3, 1.3, 1.3, 1.3, 1.3, 1 ),
  number.angles = 30
)
dev.off()

# among 16-29 years
lopnr_years_1 <- pooled_data_co %>%
  filter( age <= 29 ) %>%
  select( cohort_year, lopnr ) %>%
  distinct( cohort_year, lopnr, .keep_all = TRUE ) %>%
  mutate( value = 1 ) %>%
  pivot_wider( names_from = cohort_year, 
               values_from = value, 
               values_fill = 0 ) %>%
  as.data.frame()

pdf( "results_output/plots_general/p_overlap_co_upset_age_16_29.pdf", width = 11, height = 9, onefile = FALSE )
upset(
  data = lopnr_years_1,
  nsets = length( colnames( lopnr_years_1 )[-1] ),
  sets = colnames( lopnr_years_1 )[-1],
  keep.order = TRUE,
  order.by = "freq",
  mainbar.y.label = "Intersection Size",
  sets.x.label = "Sample Size",
  sets.bar.color = "#A32214",
  point.size = 2.5,
  line.size = 1,
  text.scale = c( 1.3, 1.3, 1.3, 1.3, 1.3, 1 ),
  number.angles = 30
)
dev.off()

lopnr_years_alluvial_1 <- lopnr_years_1 %>% # prepare for alluvial plot
  select( c( seq( 2, 14, by = 2 ), 17 ) ) %>%
  mutate( across( everything(),
                  ~ factor( ifelse( .x == 1, "Included", "Excluded" ),
                            levels = c( "Excluded", "Included" ) ) ) 
  ) %>%
  count( across( everything() ) ) %>%
  rename( number = n ) %>%
  mutate( percent = number / sum( number ) )
sum( lopnr_years_alluvial_1$number ) == nrow( lopnr_years_1 ) # TRUE

lopnr_years_alluvial_long_1 <- to_lodes_form( lopnr_years_alluvial_1, # convert to long format
                                              axes = 1:8,
                                              key = "year", 
                                              value = "inclusion_status", 
                                              id = "cohort", 
                                              diffuse = `2006` ) 

p_overlap_co_alluvial_1 <- 
  ggplot( lopnr_years_alluvial_long_1,
          aes( x = year,
               stratum = inclusion_status, 
               alluvium = cohort,
               y = percent ) ) +
  geom_alluvium( aes( fill = `2006` ), curve_type = "cubic" ) +
  geom_stratum( aes( fill = `2006` ) ) +
  geom_text( stat = "stratum", 
             aes( label = ifelse( after_stat( stratum ) == "Included", "Incl.", "Excl." ) ), 
             family = "Arial", 
             size = 11 / .pt ) +
  scale_fill_manual( values = c( "#00BFC4", "#F8766D" ),
                     breaks = c( "Included", "Excluded" ),
                     na.value = NA ) +
  scale_x_discrete( expand = expansion( mult = c( 0, 0.05 ) ) ) +
  scale_y_continuous( labels = scales::percent, breaks = c( 0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1 ) ) +
  labs( x = "Year of Cohort Sample", y = "Percentage" ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme( axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
         axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
         legend.title = element_blank(),
         legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ), 
         legend.key = element_rect( colour = "white" ),
         legend.position = "bottom",
         axis.ticks.x.bottom = element_blank(),
         axis.line.x.bottom = element_blank()
  )

p_overlap_co_alluvial_1
ggsave( "results_output/plots_general/p_overlap_co_alluvial_age_16_29.svg", plot = p_overlap_co_alluvial_1, width = 12, height = 9 )

# among 30-44 years
lopnr_years_2 <- pooled_data_co %>%
  filter( age >= 30,
          age <= 44 ) %>%
  select( cohort_year, lopnr ) %>%
  distinct( cohort_year, lopnr, .keep_all = TRUE ) %>%
  mutate( value = 1 ) %>%
  pivot_wider( names_from = cohort_year, 
               values_from = value, 
               values_fill = 0 ) %>%
  as.data.frame()

pdf( "results_output/plots_general/p_overlap_co_upset_age_30_44.pdf", width = 11, height = 9, onefile = FALSE )
upset(
  data = lopnr_years_2,
  nsets = length( colnames( lopnr_years_2 )[-1] ),
  sets = colnames( lopnr_years_2 )[-1],
  keep.order = TRUE,
  order.by = "freq",
  mainbar.y.label = "Intersection Size",
  sets.x.label = "Sample Size",
  sets.bar.color = "#A32214",
  point.size = 2.5,
  line.size = 1,
  text.scale = c( 1.3, 1.3, 1.3, 1.3, 1.3, 1 ),
  number.angles = 30
)
dev.off()

lopnr_years_alluvial_2 <- lopnr_years_2 %>% # prepare for alluvial plot
  select( c( seq( 2, 14, by = 2 ), 17 ) ) %>%
  mutate( across( everything(),
                  ~ factor( ifelse( .x == 1, "Included", "Excluded" ),
                            levels = c( "Excluded", "Included" ) ) ) 
  ) %>%
  count( across( everything() ) ) %>%
  rename( number = n ) %>%
  mutate( percent = number / sum( number ) )
sum( lopnr_years_alluvial_2$number ) == nrow( lopnr_years_2 ) # TRUE

lopnr_years_alluvial_long_2 <- to_lodes_form( lopnr_years_alluvial_2, # convert to long format
                                              axes = 1:8, 
                                              key = "year", 
                                              value = "inclusion_status", 
                                              id = "cohort", 
                                              diffuse = `2006` ) 

p_overlap_co_alluvial_2 <- 
  ggplot( lopnr_years_alluvial_long_2,
          aes( x = year,
               stratum = inclusion_status, 
               alluvium = cohort,
               y = percent ) ) +
  geom_alluvium( aes( fill = `2006` ), curve_type = "cubic" ) +
  geom_stratum( aes( fill = `2006` ) ) +
  geom_text( stat = "stratum", 
             aes( label = ifelse( after_stat( stratum ) == "Included", "Incl.", "Excl." ) ), 
             family = "Arial", 
             size = 11 / .pt ) +
  scale_fill_manual( values = c( "#00BFC4", "#F8766D" ),
                     breaks = c( "Included", "Excluded" ),
                     na.value = NA ) +
  scale_x_discrete( expand = expansion( mult = c( 0, 0.05 ) ) ) +
  scale_y_continuous( labels = scales::percent, breaks = c( 0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1 ) ) +
  labs( x = "Year of Cohort Sample", y = "Percentage" ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme( axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
         axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
         legend.title = element_blank(),
         legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ), 
         legend.key = element_rect( colour = "white" ),
         legend.position = "bottom",
         axis.ticks.x.bottom = element_blank(),
         axis.line.x.bottom = element_blank()
  )

p_overlap_co_alluvial_2
ggsave( "results_output/plots_general/p_overlap_co_alluvial_age_30_44.svg", plot = p_overlap_co_alluvial_2, width = 12, height = 9 )

# among 45-59 years
lopnr_years_3 <- pooled_data_co %>%
  filter( age >= 45,
          age <= 59 ) %>%
  select( cohort_year, lopnr ) %>%
  distinct( cohort_year, lopnr, .keep_all = TRUE ) %>%
  mutate( value = 1 ) %>%
  pivot_wider( names_from = cohort_year, 
               values_from = value, 
               values_fill = 0 ) %>%
  as.data.frame()

pdf( "results_output/plots_general/p_overlap_co_upset_age_45_59.pdf", width = 11, height = 9, onefile = FALSE )
upset(
  data = lopnr_years_3,
  nsets = length( colnames( lopnr_years_3 )[-1] ),
  sets = colnames( lopnr_years_3 )[-1],
  keep.order = TRUE,
  order.by = "freq",
  mainbar.y.label = "Intersection Size",
  sets.x.label = "Sample Size",
  sets.bar.color = "#A32214",
  point.size = 2.5,
  line.size = 1,
  text.scale = c( 1.3, 1.3, 1.3, 1.3, 1.3, 1 ),
  number.angles = 30
)
dev.off()

lopnr_years_alluvial_3 <- lopnr_years_3 %>% # prepare for alluvial plot
  select( c( seq( 2, 14, by = 2 ), 17 ) ) %>%
  mutate( across( everything(),
                  ~ factor( ifelse( .x == 1, "Included", "Excluded" ),
                            levels = c( "Excluded", "Included" ) ) ) 
  ) %>%
  count( across( everything() ) ) %>%
  rename( number = n ) %>%
  mutate( percent = number / sum( number ) )
sum( lopnr_years_alluvial_3$number ) == nrow( lopnr_years_3 ) # TRUE

lopnr_years_alluvial_long_3 <- to_lodes_form( lopnr_years_alluvial_3, # convert to long format
                                              axes = 1:8,
                                              key = "year", 
                                              value = "inclusion_status", 
                                              id = "cohort", 
                                              diffuse = `2006` ) 

p_overlap_co_alluvial_3 <- 
  ggplot( lopnr_years_alluvial_long_3,
          aes( x = year,
               stratum = inclusion_status, 
               alluvium = cohort,
               y = percent ) ) +
  geom_alluvium( aes( fill = `2006` ), curve_type = "cubic" ) +
  geom_stratum( aes( fill = `2006` ) ) +
  geom_text( stat = "stratum", 
             aes( label = ifelse( after_stat( stratum ) == "Included", "Incl.", "Excl." ) ), 
             family = "Arial", 
             size = 11 / .pt ) +
  scale_fill_manual( values = c( "#00BFC4", "#F8766D" ),
                     breaks = c( "Included", "Excluded" ),
                     na.value = NA ) +
  scale_x_discrete( expand = expansion( mult = c( 0, 0.05 ) ) ) +
  scale_y_continuous( labels = scales::percent, breaks = c( 0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1 ) ) +
  labs( x = "Year of Cohort Sample", y = "Percentage" ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme( axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
         axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
         legend.title = element_blank(),
         legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ), 
         legend.key = element_rect( colour = "white" ),
         legend.position = "bottom",
         axis.ticks.x.bottom = element_blank(),
         axis.line.x.bottom = element_blank()
  )

p_overlap_co_alluvial_3
ggsave( "results_output/plots_general/p_overlap_co_alluvial_age_45_59.svg", plot = p_overlap_co_alluvial_3, width = 12, height = 9 )
```

##### 3.3.3. Complete-case analysis
```{r}
outcome_list <- list(
  list( variable = "prescription_use_N06A", condition = "Yes", name = "antidepressant_use" ),
  list( variable = "prescription_use_N05B", condition = "Yes", name = "anxiolytic_use" )
  )

########## Prevalence ##########

# by sexual identity
results_list <- lapply( sort( unique( pooled_data_co$cohort_year ) ), function( coh_year ) {
  
  results <- cal_prev_poo_cc( year_start = coh_year,
                              year_end = 2021,
                              data = pooled_data_co %>% filter( cohort_year == coh_year ),
                              variables_list = outcome_list,
                              group_var = "sexual_identity_baseline" )
  
  bind_rows( results ) %>% mutate( cohort_year = coh_year )
  }
  )

prevalence_poo <- bind_rows( results_list )
writexl::write_xlsx( prevalence_poo, "results_output/results_cc/prevalence_poo_co_cc.xlsx" )

# by sex
results_list_by_sex <- lapply( sort( unique( pooled_data_co$cohort_year ) ), function( coh_year ) {
  
  results <- cal_prev_poo_cc( year_start = coh_year,
                              year_end = 2021,
                              data = pooled_data_co %>% filter( cohort_year == coh_year ),
                              variables_list = outcome_list,
                              group_var = "sexual_identity_baseline + sex",
                              subgroup = TRUE )
  
  bind_rows( results ) %>% mutate( cohort_year = coh_year )
  }
  )

prevalence_poo_by_sex <- bind_rows( results_list_by_sex )
writexl::write_xlsx( prevalence_poo_by_sex, "results_output/results_cc/prevalence_poo_co_by_sex_cc.xlsx" )

# by age
results_list_by_age <- lapply( sort( unique( pooled_data_co$cohort_year ) ), function( coh_year ) {
  
  results <- cal_prev_poo_cc( year_start = coh_year,
                              year_end = 2021,
                              data = pooled_data_co %>% filter( cohort_year == coh_year ),
                              variables_list = outcome_list,
                              group_var = "sexual_identity_baseline + age_group",
                              subgroup = TRUE )
  
  bind_rows( results ) %>% mutate( cohort_year = coh_year )
  }
  )

prevalence_poo_by_age <- bind_rows( results_list_by_age )
writexl::write_xlsx( prevalence_poo_by_age, "results_output/results_cc/prevalence_poo_co_by_age_cc.xlsx" )

# by age and sex
results_list_by_age_sex <- lapply( sort( unique( pooled_data_co$cohort_year ) ), function( coh_year ) {
  
  results <- cal_prev_poo_cc( year_start = coh_year,
                              year_end = 2021,
                              data = pooled_data_co %>% filter( cohort_year == coh_year ),
                              variables_list = outcome_list,
                              group_var = "sexual_identity_baseline + age_sex",
                              subgroup = TRUE )
  
  bind_rows( results ) %>% mutate( cohort_year = coh_year )
  }
  )

prevalence_poo_by_age_sex <- bind_rows( results_list_by_age_sex )
writexl::write_xlsx( prevalence_poo_by_age_sex, "results_output/results_cc/prevalence_poo_co_by_age_sex_cc.xlsx" )

# by generation
results_list_by_generation <- lapply( sort( unique( pooled_data_co$cohort_year ) ), function( coh_year ) {
  
  results <- cal_prev_poo_cc( year_start = coh_year,
                              year_end = 2021,
                              data = pooled_data_co %>% filter( cohort_year == coh_year ),
                              variables_list = outcome_list,
                              group_var = "sexual_identity_baseline + generation",
                              subgroup = TRUE )
  
  bind_rows( results ) %>% mutate( cohort_year = coh_year )
  }
  )

prevalence_poo_by_generation <- bind_rows( results_list_by_generation )
writexl::write_xlsx( prevalence_poo_by_generation, "results_output/results_cc/prevalence_poo_co_by_generation_cc.xlsx" )
```
